description:
Web Map Service (WMS) displaying a colour coded map for air quality diffusion tubes in York. 

The colour code relates to the __2018__ average level of CO2 recorded by each of the tubes, and is as follows:                                                                                                                   

__Green:__ lower than 34.5 ug/m3                                                                   
__Amber:__ between 34.5 and 39.4 ug/m3                                                                       
__Red:__ greater than 39.4 ug/m3                                                                   

Please note that the selected layer by default is __NOT__ the air quality diffusion tubes one. Please select the "AQ monitoring" layer to view air quality diffusion tubes data.                                                   

__*Please be aware this data is very demanding and, as such, the content may take a while to load when previewing it.__
__Please note that, due to slow server response, you may need to refresh the page in order to correctly preview the content.__

description: Planning obligations (section 52 and 106 agreements) are linked to a planning application decision, made either by the local planning authority or by the Planning Inspectorate in the case of an appeal against a refusal of planning permission. The planning obligation relates to the land within the planning application, rather than the person or organisation that develops the land. It is, therefore, recorded as a land charge, and the obligations under it run with the land ownership until they are fully complied with, often indefinitely.
name: section_52_and_106_agreements
